BP_DRAW_MOUSE_LINE.label: Draw Mouse Line
BP_DRAW_MOUSE_LINE.description: When enabled, a line is drawn from the center of the screen to the current mouse position.
BP_DRAW_MOUSE.label: Show Mouse Position
BP_DRAW_MOUSE.description: Displays a visual indicator at the current mouse position on the Dasher canvas.
BP_CURVE_MOUSE_LINE.label: Curve Mouse Line Path
BP_CURVE_MOUSE_LINE.description: If 'Draw Mouse Line' is active, this makes the line follow a curved path that accounts for Dasher's non-linear coordinate space.
BP_START_MOUSE.label: Start/Stop with Mouse
BP_START_MOUSE.description: Enables starting and stopping the Dasher motion by moving the mouse.
BP_START_SPACE.label: Start/Stop with Spacebar
BP_START_SPACE.description: Enables using the spacebar to start and stop the Dasher motion.
BP_PALETTE_CHANGE.label: Auto Palette Switch
BP_PALETTE_CHANGE.description: Switch from color palette in setting automatically to the one provided in the alphabet.
BP_TURBO_MODE.label: Turbo Mode
BP_TURBO_MODE.description: Boost speed when holding key1 or right mouse button.
BP_SMOOTH_PRESS_MODE.label: Smoothing Pressure Mode
BP_SMOOTH_DRAW_MOUSE.label: Show Smoothed Mouse Pos
BP_SMOOTH_DRAW_MOUSE.description: If enabled, the mouse indicator will show the smoothed position, not the raw input.
BP_SMOOTH_DRAW_MOUSE_LINE.label: Draw Smoothed Mouse Line
BP_SMOOTH_DRAW_MOUSE_LINE.description: If enabled, the drawn mouse line will also be smoothed, showing the filtered input path.
BP_SMOOTH_ONLY_FORWARD.label: Smooth Forwards Only
BP_SMOOTH_ONLY_FORWARD.description: If enabled, input smoothing is only applied when moving forward (zooming in), not when reversing.
BP_EXACT_DYNAMICS.label: Precise Dynamics
BP_EXACT_DYNAMICS.description: Enables a more precise, but potentially less smooth, physics model for movement.
BP_AUTOCALIBRATE.label: Auto-Calibrate Target
BP_AUTOCALIBRATE.description: Automatically adjusts the 'straight-ahead' point based on the user's average pointer position.
BP_REMAP_XTREME.label: Remap Extreme Angles
BP_REMAP_XTREME.description: Distorts geometry to provide more space for navigating at extreme up/down angles.
BP_AUTO_SPEEDCONTROL.label: Automatic Speed Control
BP_AUTO_SPEEDCONTROL.description: Automatically adjusts the maximum writing speed based on user performance.
BP_LM_ADAPTIVE.label: Adaptive Language Model
BP_LM_ADAPTIVE.description: Whether language model should learn as you enter text.
BP_NONLINEAR_Y.label: Nonlinear Y-Axis
BP_NONLINEAR_Y.description: Apply nonlinearities to Y axis (i.e. compress top & bottom).
BP_STOP_OUTSIDE.label: Stop When Pointer Leaves
BP_STOP_OUTSIDE.description: Automatically stops Dasher motion if the mouse cursor leaves the canvas area.
BP_BACKOFF_BUTTON.label: Back-off on Release
BP_BACKOFF_BUTTON.description: If enabled, releasing a button will cause Dasher to slightly zoom out, making it easier to correct mistakes.
BP_TWOBUTTON_REVERSE.label: Second Button Reverses
BP_TWOBUTTON_REVERSE.description: When enabled, the second button in a two-button setup will trigger a reverse/zoom-out action.
BP_2B_INVERT_DOUBLE.label: Invert Double Press Action
BP_2B_INVERT_DOUBLE.description: Inverts the function of a double press on the second button.
BP_SLOW_START.label: Slow Start
BP_SLOW_START.description: When enabled, Dasher will gradually accelerate to the desired speed from a standstill.
BP_COPY_ALL_ON_STOP.label: Copy on Stop
BP_COPY_ALL_ON_STOP.description: Copy all text to clipboard whenever we stop.
BP_SPEAK_ALL_ON_STOP.label: Speak on Stop
BP_SPEAK_ALL_ON_STOP.description: Speak all text whenever we stop.
BP_SPEAK_WORDS.label: Speak Words
BP_SPEAK_WORDS.description: Speak words as they are written.
BP_GAME_HELP_DRAW_PATH.label: Draw Help Path
BP_GAME_HELP_DRAW_PATH.description: When we give help, show the shortest path to the target sentence.
BP_TWO_PUSH_RELEASE_TIME.label: Enable Release Time Logic
BP_TWO_PUSH_RELEASE_TIME.description: Toggles timing behavior upon button release in two-push mode.
BP_SIMULATE_TRANSPARENCY.label: Simulate Transparency
BP_SIMULATE_TRANSPARENCY.description: Enable the internal color mixing and thus the need to support alpha blending in the renderer.
LP_ORIENTATION.label: Screen Orientation
LP_MAX_BITRATE.label: Max Speed (bits/sec)
LP_MAX_BITRATE.description: The maximum writing speed. If 'Automatic Speed Control' is off, this is the fixed speed.
LP_FRAMERATE.label: Demo Framerate
LP_FRAMERATE.description: The target framerate for running automated demos.
LP_LANGUAGE_MODEL_ID.label: Language Model
LP_DASHER_FONTSIZE.label: Dasher Font Size
LP_DASHER_FONTSIZE.description: Font size reached at crosshair (in points).
LP_MESSAGE_FONTSIZE.label: Message Font Size
LP_MESSAGE_FONTSIZE.description: Size of font for messages (in points).
LP_SHAPE_TYPE.label: Node Shape
LP_START_MODE.label: Start Mode
LP_UNIFORM.label: Uniform Probability
LP_UNIFORM.description: Uniform probability weight (×1000). Higher values make less-probable symbols larger.
LP_MOUSEPOSDIST.label: Mouse Position Distance
LP_PY_PROB_SORT_THRES.label: Pinyin Sort Threshold
LP_PY_PROB_SORT_THRES.description: Sort converted syms in descending probability order up to this percentage.
LP_MESSAGE_TIME.label: Message Display Time
LP_MESSAGE_TIME.description: Time for which non-modal messages are displayed, in ms.
LP_LM_MAX_ORDER.label: Max N-gram Order
LP_LM_MAX_ORDER.description: Maximum n-gram order for the language model.
LP_LM_EXCLUSION.label: Language Model Exclusion
LP_LM_UPDATE_EXCLUSION.label: LM Update Exclusion
LP_LM_ALPHA.label: LM Alpha
LP_LM_BETA.label: LM Beta
LP_LM_MIXTURE.label: LM Mixture
LP_LINE_WIDTH.label: Mouse Line Width
LP_LINE_WIDTH.description: Sets the thickness of the line drawn to the mouse cursor.
LP_GEOMETRY.label: Screen Geometry
LP_GEOMETRY.description: Changes the geometric projection used to display the Dasher world.
LP_LM_WORD_ALPHA.label: Word Alpha
LP_USER_LOG_LEVEL_MASK.label: User Log Level
LP_USER_LOG_LEVEL_MASK.description: Controls level of user logging, 0 = none, 1 = short, 2 = detailed, 3 = both.
LP_ZOOMSTEPS.label: Zoom Steps
LP_ZOOMSTEPS.description: Defines how many discrete steps are needed to zoom from the outer edge to the center.
LP_B.label: B-Parameter
LP_B.description: Number of boxes for button menu mode.
LP_S.label: S-Parameter
LP_S.description: Algorithmic constant related to speed or sensitivity in button mode.
LP_BUTTON_SCAN_TIME.label: Scan Time
LP_BUTTON_SCAN_TIME.description: In modes that automatically scan options, this sets the time in milliseconds to wait at each step.
LP_R.label: R-Parameter
LP_RIGHTZOOM.label: Right Zoom Multiplier
LP_RIGHTZOOM.description: A multiplier affecting zoom speed when using compass mode.
LP_NODE_BUDGET.label: Node Budget
LP_NODE_BUDGET.description: Target (min) number of node objects to maintain.
LP_OUTLINE_WIDTH.label: Outline Width
LP_OUTLINE_WIDTH.description: Absolute value is line width to draw boxes (fill iff >=0).
LP_TEXT_PADDING.label: Text Padding
LP_TEXT_PADDING.description: Pixel distance to inset the letters into the boxes.
LP_MIN_NODE_SIZE.label: Min Node Size
LP_MIN_NODE_SIZE.description: Minimum size of node (in dasher coords) to draw.
LP_NONLINEAR_X.label: Nonlinear X-Axis
LP_NONLINEAR_X.description: Nonlinear compression of X-axis (0 = none, higher = more extreme).
LP_AUTOSPEED_SENSITIVITY.label: Auto-Speed Sensitivity
LP_CIRCLE_PERCENT.label: Circle Start Size
LP_CIRCLE_PERCENT.description: Percentage of nominal vertical range to use for radius of start circle.
LP_TWO_BUTTON_OFFSET.label: Two Button Offset
LP_TWO_BUTTON_OFFSET.description: A positional or timing offset related to the second button's input.
LP_HOLD_TIME.label: Button Hold Time
LP_HOLD_TIME.description: Minimum time (in ms) a button must be pressed to be considered a 'hold' instead of a 'tap'.
LP_MULTIPRESS_TIME.label: Multi-Press Window
LP_MULTIPRESS_TIME.description: The time window (in ms) within which multiple presses are counted as a single sequence.
LP_SLOW_START_TIME.label: Slow Start Duration
LP_SLOW_START_TIME.description: The time in milliseconds it takes to accelerate to full speed when 'Slow Start' is enabled.
LP_SMOOTH_TAU.label: Smoothing Amount
LP_SMOOTH_TAU.description: The time constant for input smoothing. Higher values result in smoother but less responsive input.
LP_TWO_PUSH_OUTER.label: Two-Push Outer Zone
LP_TWO_PUSH_OUTER.description: Defines the size of the outer zone for the 'two-push' control scheme.
LP_TWO_PUSH_LONG.label: Long Push Time
LP_TWO_PUSH_LONG.description: Defines the minimum duration (in ms) of a 'long push'.
LP_TWO_PUSH_SHORT.label: Short Push Time
LP_TWO_PUSH_SHORT.description: Defines the maximum duration (in ms) of a 'short push'.
LP_TWO_PUSH_TOLERANCE.label: Two-Push Tolerance
LP_TWO_PUSH_TOLERANCE.description: Positional tolerance for activating controls in the 'two-push' scheme.
LP_DYNAMIC_BUTTON_LAG.label: Dynamic Button Lag
LP_DYNAMIC_BUTTON_LAG.description: Lag time specifically for the two-push dynamic mode.
LP_STATIC1B_TIME.label: Static Zoom Time
LP_STATIC1B_TIME.description: The time in milliseconds for static mode to scan from top to bottom.
LP_STATIC1B_ZOOM.label: Static Zoom Step
LP_STATIC1B_ZOOM.description: The amount of zoom applied per step in static mode.
LP_MAXZOOM.label: Zoom Sensitivity / Max Zoom
LP_MAXZOOM.description: Controls zoom mechanics in click mode.
LP_DYNAMIC_SPEED_INC.label: Auto-Speed Increment
LP_DYNAMIC_SPEED_INC.description: The amount the speed is increased by at each update interval if the user is navigating well.
LP_DYNAMIC_SPEED_FREQ.label: Auto-Speed Update Freq.
LP_DYNAMIC_SPEED_FREQ.description: When 'Auto Speed Control' is on, this is how often the speed is re-evaluated.
LP_DYNAMIC_SPEED_DEC.label: Speed Reduction on Reverse
LP_DYNAMIC_SPEED_DEC.description: The amount the speed is decreased when the user reverses direction.
LP_TAP_TIME.label: Stylus Tap Time
LP_TAP_TIME.description: The maximum time (in ms) for a stylus press to be considered a 'tap' for selecting items.
LP_MARGIN_WIDTH.label: Margin Width
LP_MARGIN_WIDTH.description: Width of RHS margin (in Dasher co-ords).
LP_TARGET_OFFSET.label: Target Calibration Offset
LP_TARGET_OFFSET.description: A manual vertical offset to adjust the 'straight-ahead' point.
LP_X_LIMIT_SPEED.label: Horizontal Speed Limit
LP_X_LIMIT_SPEED.description: A multiplier that caps the maximum horizontal speed, making it easier to stay on target.
LP_GAME_HELP_DIST.label: Game Help Distance
LP_GAME_HELP_DIST.description: Distance of sentence from center to decide user needs help.
LP_GAME_HELP_TIME.label: Game Help Time
LP_GAME_HELP_TIME.description: Time for which user must need help before help drawn.
SP_ALPHABET_ID.label: Alphabet
SP_ALPHABET_1.label: Alphabet History 1
SP_ALPHABET_2.label: Alphabet History 2
SP_ALPHABET_3.label: Alphabet History 3
SP_ALPHABET_4.label: Alphabet History 4
SP_COLOUR_ID.label: Color Palette
SP_DASHER_FONT.label: Dasher Font
SP_GAME_TEXT_FILE.label: Game Text File
SP_GAME_TEXT_FILE.description: User-specified file with strings to practice writing.
SP_INPUT_FILTER.label: Input Filter
SP_INPUT_FILTER.description: Input filter used to provide the current control mode.
SP_INPUT_DEVICE.label: Input Device
SP_BUTTON_MAPPINGS.label: Button Mappings
SP_JOYSTICK_XAXIS.label: Joystick X Axis
SP_JOYSTICK_XAXIS.description: Joystick axis used for X-axis input.
SP_JOYSTICK_YAXIS.label: Joystick Y Axis
SP_JOYSTICK_YAXIS.description: Joystick axis used for Y-axis input.
